name: Red Pepper and Jalapeno Jam
recipeIngredient: 1 lb sweet red bell peppers; seeded and ribs removed
1/4 lb jalapeno peppers; seeded and pith removed
1 package of pectin (amount varies by brand)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, finely chop the red peppers and jalapenos with a little vinegar.
2. Transfer to a non-reactive pan and add the remaining vinegar and salt. Bring to a boil.
3. Simmer over medium heat for about 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and measure out 3 cups; if needed, add fresh lime juice to reach 3 cups total.
5. Return to the pan and stir in sugar and powdered pectin. Mix well and bring to a rolling boil.
6. Cook for approximately 5 minutes until thickened.
7. Remove from heat and taste for chile heat. Add Tabasco if desired.
8. Pour into sterilized jars and seal. Allow to cool, then label and store in the pantry.
9. Enjoy on bagels with cream cheese.
